2026-04-04T15:30:11.8467975Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-04T15:28:59.186383566Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57802,\"title\":\"[BUG] TablesTypeBinder.TryGet throws ArgumentNullException on null values for Int64/Int64? properties\",\"body\":\"### Library name and version\\n\\nAzure.Data.Tables 12.8.x with Azure.Core 1.47.x (Azure.Core.dll file version: 1.4700.125.36505)\\n\\n### Describe the bug\\n\\nWhen using `TableClient.QueryAsync()` with a model containing an Int64 (`long`) or nullable Int64 (`long?`) property, the Azure SDK throws `ArgumentNullException: Value cannot be null. (Parameter \\u0026#39;s\\u0026#39;)` when encountering a row where the stored value is null. This affects both nullable and non-nullable long types, making it impossible to query tables containing null numeric values without the query failing entirely.\\n\\nEven when using `long?` (nullable), the bug still occurs because the `TablesTypeBinder.TryGet` method uses identical code for both `long` and `long?`.\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nWhen a table contains null values in Int64 columns:\\n- Non-nullable long properties should return `default(long)` (0).\\n- Nullable `long?` properties should return null.\\n- At minimum, no unhandled exception should be thrown.\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nThe query fails with an unhandled `ArgumentNullException` when the SDK encounters a table row with a null value in an Int64 column. The exception is thrown during deserialization, before any results are returned to the caller - meaning the entire query fails and no data can be retrieved from tables containing null numeric values.\\n\\n```\\nSystem.ArgumentNullException: Value cannot be null. (Parameter \\u0026#39;s\\u0026#39;)\\n   at System.Int64.Parse(String s, IFormatProvider provider)\\n   at Azure.Data.Tables.TablesTypeBinder.TryGet[T](BoundMemberInfo memberInfo, IDictionary`2 source, T\\u0026amp; value)\\n   at Azure.Core.TypeBinder`1.BoundMemberInfo`1.Deserialize(TExchange source, Object o, TypeBinder`1 binderImplementation)\\n   at Azure.Core.TypeBinder`1.BoundTypeInfo.Deserialize[T](TExchange source)\\n   at Azure.Data.Tables.DictionaryTableExtensions.ToTableEntity[T](IDictionary`2 entity, BoundTypeInfo typeInfo)\\n   at Azure.Data.Tables.DictionaryTableExtensions.ToTableEntityList[T](IReadOnlyList`1 entityList)\\n   at Azure.Data.Tables.TableClient.\\u0026lt;\\u0026gt;c__DisplayClass55_0`1.\\u0026lt;b__0\\u0026gt;d.MoveNext()\\n```\\n\\n### Reproduction Steps\\n\\n```c#\\n// Model with non-nullable long - CRASHES when stored value is null\\npublic class TestEntity : ITableEntity\\n{\\n    public string PartitionKey { get; set; }\\n    public string RowKey { get; set; }\\n    public DateTimeOffset? Timestamp { get; set; }\\n    public ETag ETag { get; set; }\\n    public long Depth { get; set; }  // Crashes with null values\\n}\\n\\n// Model with nullable long? - ALSO CRASHES!\\npublic class TestEntityNullable : ITableEntity\\n{\\n    public string PartitionKey { get; set; }\\n    public string RowKey { get; set; }\\n    public DateTimeOffset? Timestamp { get; set; }\\n    public ETag ETag { get; set; }\\n    public long? Depth { get; set; }  // Still crashes!\\n}\\n\\n// Usage that triggers the bug:\\nawait foreach (var result in tableClient.QueryAsync())\\n{\\n    // Never reached - crashes on first null value\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Environment\\n\\n- **Hosting platform:** Windows 10/11, Azure App Service\\n- **IDE:** Visual Studio 2022\\n- **.NET:** .NET 8.0\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57802\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"cassxw\",\"id\":80965832,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/cassxw\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/80965832?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-04T15:26:55Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-04T15:26:55Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

(Parameter \\u0026#39;s\\u0026#39;)` when encountering a row where the stored value is null. 2026-04-04T15:30:11.9076458Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-04T15:30:11.9076666Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-04T15:30:11.9076989Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-04T15:30:11.9077108Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
